name: CreateUserRequiresManageUsers
description: CreateUser requires ManageUsers role OR SuperAdmin. Missing both → ForbidWithMessage.

name: EmailMustBeUnique
description: User email must not already exist in the system. _userService.UserExists(email) → BadRequest if true.

name: DeleteUserRequiresAccessCheck
description: DeleteUser requires ManageUsers + CanUserAccessUser (or SuperAdmin). Protected users cannot be deleted without SuperAdmin.

name: SetUserRolesRequiresManageUsers
description: SetUserRoleAccess requires ManageUsers OR SuperAdmin. Protected user guard applies.

name: CrossCustomerUserCreationRequiresProfileAccess
description: When creating user with profiles from multiple customers, current user must have access to ALL those customers. CheckUserAccessToCustomersOfProfileIds → Forbid if any customer inaccessible.

name: ProtectedUserRequiresSuperAdmin
description: Users with Protected role cannot be modified (deleted, role-changed) by non-SuperAdmin users.

name: UpdateCustomerLogPreservesCreatedDate
description: UpdateCustomerLog must preserve the original DateInsertedUTC — loaded from DB before update.

name: GetCustomerUsersCurrentCustomerOnly
description: GetCustomerUsers returns users for CurrentCustomerId only — no customerId parameter accepted. Tenant isolation enforced by WorkContext.
